message:
fix(core): switch tracing tests to set_default for cross-thread subscriber coverage

Replace tracing::subscriber::with_default() with set_default() in two
ffs-core test functions. The with_default variant only installs the
subscriber on the calling thread, causing flaky failures when background
tasks log against a different subscriber. set_default() applies globally
and the returned guard is explicitly dropped after the test to restore
the previous subscriber.

Also updates issue tracking metadata with completion timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
